description: Internal panel resizing, dark-themed scrollbars, application menu bar (File/Edit/View/Help), and panel position toggle.

userStories.title: Resizable Staging Area Internal Split
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag the divider between file lists and commit form in the staging area.
acceptanceCriteria: The gray line between file lists (unstaged/staged) and commit form is a 5px draggable handle
Cursor: row-resize on hover, subtle highlight
Dragging adjusts the vertical split between file lists (top) and commit form (bottom)
Min heights: file lists 80px, commit form 120px
Add stagingInternalSplit: number (percent for file list share, default 65) to LayoutState
Split persists across restarts via existing debounced localStorage save
Uses mousedown/mousemove/mouseup drag pattern (same as sidebar/right panel handles)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: StatusPanel.tsx renders the file lists and commit form. The commit form is in styles.commitForm div. The divider is the borderTop on the commit form section. Replace with a drag handle div.

userStories.title: Resizable Commit Details Internal Split
userStories.description: As a user, I want to drag the divider between commit metadata and the changed files list.
acceptanceCriteria: The gray line between commit metadata (subject, author, date, body) and files section is a 5px draggable handle
Cursor: row-resize on hover, subtle highlight
Dragging adjusts the split: metadata above, files below
Min heights: metadata 100px, files 80px
Add detailInternalSplit: number (percent for metadata share, default 40) to LayoutState
Split persists across restarts
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DetailPanel.tsx renders metadata in styles.content div, then files in styles.filesSection div.

userStories.title: Dark-Themed Scrollbars
userStories.description: As a user, I want scrollbars to match the dark theme instead of being bright white.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ::-webkit-scrollbar CSS to global.css: width 8px, border-radius 4px
Scrollbar track: transparent or var(--bg-primary)
Scrollbar thumb: var(--border) color with border-radius 4px
Scrollbar thumb:hover: slightly brighter (var(--text-muted) or similar)
Light theme [data-theme='light'] gets appropriate light-themed scrollbar colors
Applied globally so all scrollable areas get themed scrollbars
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add to global.css. Use ::-webkit-scrollbar, ::-webkit-scrollbar-track, ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb. Electron uses Chromium so webkit prefix works.

userStories.title: Application Menu Bar — File Menu
userStories.description: As a user, I want a File menu with repository operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Native Electron menu in src/main/index.ts using Menu.buildFromTemplate() and Menu.setApplicationMenu()
File menu: New Window, Open Repository (Ctrl+O), Clone Repository (Ctrl+Shift+C), Init Repository, separator, Close Tab (Ctrl+W), separator, Settings (Ctrl+comma), separator, Quit (Ctrl+Q)
Open Repository triggers dialog.showOpenDialog and sends path to renderer via IPC
Clone/Close Tab/Settings send IPC events to renderer
Renderer listens for menu IPC events in App.tsx and triggers appropriate actions
Add IPC listeners in preload exposed via electronAPI
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Import Menu from electron in main/index.ts. Build template in app.whenReady(). IPC: mainWindow.webContents.send('menu:X'). Preload: ipcRenderer.on('menu:X', callback).

userStories.title: Application Menu Bar — Edit, View, Help Menus
userStories.description: As a user, I want Edit, View, and Help menus.
acceptanceCriteria: Edit menu: Undo, Redo, Cut, Copy, Paste, Select All — all role-based Electron menu items
View menu: Toggle Sidebar (IPC), Toggle Terminal (IPC), separator, Zoom In/Out/Reset (role-based), separator, Toggle Full Screen (role), separator, Dev Tools (role)
Help menu: Keyboard Shortcuts (IPC), separator, About GitSlop (dialog with app name, version, Electron version)
About uses dialog.showMessageBox() in main process
Renderer handles menu IPC events for sidebar/terminal toggles and keyboard shortcuts panel
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Add to same Menu.buildFromTemplate() from US-PM-004. Edit is entirely role-based. View mixes roles with IPC. Help uses dialog.showMessageBox for About.

userStories.title: Movable Right Panel Position (Right or Bottom)
userStories.description: As a user, I want to move the right panel to the bottom of the screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Add rightPanelPosition: 'right' | 'bottom' to LayoutState with default 'right'
When 'right': current layout — detail+staging as a column on the right
When 'bottom': detail+staging renders below center as a horizontal strip, full width
In bottom position: detail and staging are side-by-side (flex-direction: row)
A toggle button in the right panel header switches position
Position persists across restarts
Terminal panel always stays at the very bottom below everything
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: In AppLayout: if rightPanelPosition is 'bottom', render detail+staging below center. Use a toggle button instead of drag-and-drop.
